allow: PowerShell($cmds = @\(\); foreach\($n in @\('7z','7z.exe','unrar','winrar','rar'\)\){ try { $c = Get-Command $n -ErrorAction Stop; $cmds += $c } catch {} }; $cmds | Format-Table Name, Source -AutoSize; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\7-Zip","C:\\Program Files\\WinRAR" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($paths = @\('C:\\Program Files\\7-Zip\\7z.exe','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\7-Zip\\7z.exe','C:\\Program Files\\WinRAR\\WinRAR.exe','C:\\Program Files\\WinRAR\\Rar.exe','C:\\Program Files\\WinRAR\\UnRAR.exe','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\WinRAR\\UnRAR.exe'\); $paths | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $w = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; "Word OK: $\($w.Version\)"; $w.Quit\(\) } catch { "Word not available: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { & soffice --version 2>&1 } catch {}; try { Get-Command pandoc -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Source } catch {})
Bash(python -c "import sys; [print\(l\) for l in sys.stdin]")
Bash(python -c "from chanlun_core import find_pivots, Pivot; print\('ok', Pivot\)")
